# QLPreviewViewStyle.compact

**Case**

Provides a compact preview style suited for smaller previews or inspectors.

## Declaration

```swift
case compact
```

## Discussion

A more compact style for a [doc://com.apple.quicklookui/documentation/QuickLookUI/QLPreviewView] object. Use this style for smaller previews or inspectors.

## Choosing a Preview Style

- **QLPreviewViewStyle.normal**: Provides the default preview style for larger, full-sized previews.
